Product Details:

AMD EPYC 24 CORE PROCESSOR 9255 3.2GHZ BASE / 4.3GHZ MAX 128MB L3 CACHE TDP 200W SP5 SOCKET ( TURIN ) ( 5TH GEN ) ( UNLOCKED )

MANUFACTURER: AMD
PART NUMBER: 100-000000694
CPU SERIES: 5TH GEN AMD EPYC FAMILY ( 9005 SERIES )
PROCESSOR CODE NAME: TURIN
SOCKET TYPE: SP5

NOTE: NO HEATSINK, NO ACCESSORIES OR TOOLS INCLUDED

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: THIS PROCESSOR IS VENDOR UNLOCKED



PERFORMANCE

CPU FREQUENCY: 3.2GHZ
CPU ALL CORE BOOST FREQUENCY: 4GHZ
CPU MAX TURBO FREQUENCY: 4.2GHZ
MULTI-CORE: 24-CORE
THREADS: 48
CACHE: 128MB L3
THERMAL DESIGN POWER: 200W
CONFIGURABLE TDP ( CTDP ): 200-240W
NUMBER OF PROCESSORS SUPPORTED: 1P / 2P


MEMORY SPECS

MEMORY TYPES: DDR5
MAX MEMORY FREQUENCY: 6000 MHZ ( DDR5 )
MAX NUM. MEMORY CHANNELS: 12
PER SOCKET MEMORY BANDWIDTH: 576GB/S


EXPANSION OPTIONS

PCI EXPRESSION REVISION: PCI-E 5.0 X128


KEY FEATURES

SUPPORTED TECHNOLOGIES:
AMD INFINITY GUARD
AMD INFINITY ARCHITECTURE

WORKLOAD AFFINITY:
ERM / SCM / CRM APPS
GENERAL PURPOSE
NETWORKING / NFV
WEB SERVING

Your privacy is our priority. We use cookies to offer an improved online experience. By clicking 'Accept all', you consent to our use of all cookies. You may click 'Configure settings' to only enable the specific categories you have chosen below.

Cookie Settings

IT Creations uses three primary categories of cookies as described below. You can decide which categories of cookies you wish to accept to improve your experience on our website.

To learn more about the specific cookies we use on our site and how they impact your experience, please read our Cookie Policy.

Default Cookies

These cookies are necessary to ensure the proper functioning of the website. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. Without these, the website cannot function correctly.

Analytics Cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This data allows us to improve our website's performance and provide a smoother user experience.

Marketing Cookies

These cookies are used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant and engaging for the individual user and thereby more valuable for publishers and third-party advertisers.
